title: Votes Cast
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS votes FROM PowerplayVote WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Faction AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM PowerplayVote WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Faction ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {votes} powerplay vote(s) cast during the report period. Voting is the most passive form of political participation available — each vote contributes to the weekly system preparation tally and, for dedicated voters, can influence which systems your Power targets next.
details.help: PowerplayVote Faction is the system target being voted for. votes drives the title as the total civic engagement count.

tagLines: Powerplay voting records compiled. Civic participation contribution noted by the Power's systems office.
You voted. Not everyone does. The tally only works if people show up.
Voting in Powerplay is quiet work. No medals, no rank. Just influence, one tick at a time.
